name: Slimy Kiss
outcome: Gren aggressively forces her way past [ThePlayerName]'s lips with her mouth and tongue, briefly teasing his own tongue before retreating.
miss: [AttackerName] leans forward to give [TargetName] a big kiss, but [TargetHeOrShe] keeps out of reach.
statusOutcome: The excitement of the battle seems to have led Gren to exude more of her natural lubricant, and her mouth and tongue play sends it directly down [TargetName]'s throat as its perfume wafts up his nose. In spite of [TargetName]'s efforts to keep his focus, it's like his brain and muscles are turning to mush. Your defense has been lowered!
